# Alter Nine

> Custom websites with built-in booking systems for service businesses. Accept bookings, deposits and manage appointments from a single site — no third-party booking pages, no platforms.

Founder: Delyana. Legal entity: Booka LTD (Буука ЕООД), ЕИК 208363525, registered in Bulgaria. Working with service businesses across Europe, the UK and the US (English and Bulgarian).

## What Alter Nine does

- Custom-built websites tailored to each service business
- Integrated booking system (powered by Clicka) embedded directly in the site
- Deposit collection and appointment management from one dashboard
- Bilingual support (English / Bulgarian) where needed

## How it works

1. Discovery call to understand the business, services and audience.
2. Custom design and build — no templates, no page builders.
3. Booking system embedded into the site with services, prices and deposits.
4. Launch on the client's own domain. Client owns the domain, content and site.
5. The booking system runs on Alter Nine's infrastructure; if the engagement ends, only that integration stops.

## Pricing

Pricing is per project and depends on scope (pages, languages, booking complexity, integrations). Typical custom site with integrated booking starts in the low four-figure EUR range. Quote provided after the discovery call.

## Pages

- [Home (English)](https://alternine.co/): Hero, portfolio, process, about, contact
- [Home (Bulgarian)](https://alternine.co/bg): Bulgarian version of the landing page
- [Booking demo](https://alternine.co/booking): Live demo of the integrated booking flow

- [Сайт за barbershop](https://alternine.co/bg/sait-za-barbershop)

## Selected work

- [Urban by Delyana](https://www.salonurban.online/en): Bilingual website for a hair-coloring salon in Varna
- Kozrlab: Car detailing studio in Varna with custom site and Telegram bot integration
- Salon Paradise (concept): Concept site for a face treatment salon
